title: Pseudopilocereus luetzelburgii
taxonomy: Pseudopilocereus luetzelburgii belongs to the family Cactaceae. It is a species of cactus in the genus Pseudopilocereus. The genus Pseudopilocereus is a group of epiphytic cacti, which are plants that grow on other plants for support. Pseudopilocereus luetzelburgii is native to South America and is classified as an epiphytic cactus species. The classification of Pseudopilocereus luetzelburgii is within the kingdom Plantae.
